code: import apiClient from'./apiClient';const studentService={listStudents:async function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};const response=await apiClient.get('/students',{params});return response.data.students;},getStudent:async studentId=>{const response=await apiClient.get(`/students/${studentId}`);return response.data.student;},createStudent:async payload=>{const response=await apiClient.post('/students',payload);return response.data.student;},updateStudent:async(studentId,payload)=>{const response=await apiClient.put(`/students/${studentId}`,payload);return response.data.student;},deleteStudent:async studentId=>{const response=await apiClient.delete(`/students/${studentId}`);return response.data;}};export default studentService;
